objective: Ensure Tau CLI-imported runtime modules are tracked with focused deterministic proof.

commands_run.command: git ls-files src/tau_coding/orchestration_evidence.py src/tau_coding/dag_stress_poc.py src/tau_coding/media_explainer_orchestration.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_poc.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_worker.py tests/test_orchestration_evidence.py tests/test_dag_stress_poc.py tests/test_media_explainer_orchestration.py tests/test_visible_dag_poc.py tests/test_persona_dream_panel_agent.py scripts/run-real-world-sanity.sh
commands_run.summary: No matching tracked files were listed before this slice.
Confirmed committed CLI/provider modules import these runtime files.

commands_run.command: uv run pytest tests/test_orchestration_evidence.py tests/test_dag_stress_poc.py tests/test_media_explainer_orchestration.py tests/test_visible_dag_poc.py -q

uv run python -m compileall -q src/tau_coding/orchestration_evidence.py src/tau_coding/dag_stress_poc.py src/tau_coding/media_explainer_orchestration.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_poc.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_worker.py

uv run ruff check src/tau_coding/orchestration_evidence.py src/tau_coding/dag_stress_poc.py src/tau_coding/media_explainer_orchestration.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_poc.py src/tau_coding/visible_dag_worker.py tests/test_orchestration_evidence.py tests/test_dag_stress_poc.py tests/test_media_explainer_orchestration.py tests/test_visible_dag_poc.py

proves: The focused CLI-imported runtime modules import and compile in the current Tau environment.
The focused orchestration evidence, DAG stress, media explainer, and visible DAG tests pass deterministically.
The focused candidate files satisfy Ruff checks after formatting repair.
does_not_prove: Herdr-visible provider DAG execution for these modules.
